fields.name: scope
fields.label: Repository Scope
fields.description: Repository scope in the CLI format: `@me`, `org:<name>`, or `repo:<owner>/<name>`.

fields.name: limit
fields.label: Repository Limit
fields.description: Cap the number of repositories scanned for testing or smaller runs.

fields.name: concurrency
fields.label: Concurrency
fields.description: Parallel API calls to make during collection.

fields.name: includeArchived
fields.label: Include archived repositories
fields.description: Include archived repositories in the scan.

fields.name: includeForks
fields.label: Include forks
fields.description: Include forked repositories in the scan.

output.label: Output Mode
output.description: Choose how GitHub collection results should be emitted: summary text, JSON, or no stdout output.

refresh.label: Refresh cached findings
refresh.description: Ignore cache and always re-query GitHub.
